data.content:
Plan:
1. Replace the settings scan allowlist so it only discovers Claude, Codex, and Gemini CLIs; remove ChatGPT/OpenRouter scan entries.
2. Add a centralized agent identity parser/detector that maps command/config data into provider name, model family, and version, and use CLI/config inspection for Codex and Claude where available.
3. Extend scanned-agent and registered-agent metadata so scan-add flows persist normalized provider/model/version instead of relying on ad hoc labels.
4. Update settings, active terminals, terminal info bar, and history views to render the normalized provider/model/version consistently.
5. Add/adjust tests for scan detection, metadata normalization, and UI-facing formatting helpers; then run lint, typecheck, tests, and build.
